context: Agent was given prose requirements for an auth migration and asked to produce a wave execution plan. Evaluate the resulting .context/plans/auth-token-migration.md.

checklist.name: correct-wave-count-and-structure
checklist.description: Plan has exactly 5 waves matching the topological sort: (1) audit, (2) issuance + validation in parallel, (3) route guard, (4) legacy removal in parallel, (5) regression + runbook

checklist.name: no-intra-wave-dependencies
checklist.description: No wave contains two tasks where one depends on the other (e.g. issuance and validation are in the same wave, not split across waves)

checklist.name: parallel-sequential-labels-correct
checklist.description: Waves 2 and 4 are labelled 'parallel'; waves 1, 3, and 5 are labelled 'sequential' (single task each)

checklist.name: output-file-written
checklist.description: Wave document is written to .context/plans/auth-token-migration.md (correct path, correct slug)

checklist.name: dependency-graph-present
checklist.description: An ASCII DAG section is included showing the dependency structure between waves and tasks

checklist.name: branch-strategy-present
checklist.description: A branch strategy table is included assigning one branch per parallel task using the feat/auth-<slug> pattern

checklist.name: verification-checklists-present
checklist.description: Each wave has a Verification: checklist with at least one concrete, runnable command

checklist.name: no-invented-dependencies
checklist.description: Agent does not add ordering constraints not stated in the requirements (e.g. does not force issuance before validation or vice versa)
